samples.gvd:
module fsm
(
    input IN,
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg MATCH
);

reg [2:0] state, next_state;

parameter S0 = 3'b000, S1 = 3'b001, S2 = 3'b010, S3 = 3'b011, S4 = 3'b100, S5 = 3'b101, S6 = 3'b110, S7 = 3'b111;

always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        state <= S0;
        MATCH <= 1'b0;
    end
    else begin
        state <= next_state;
        case (state)
            S0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S2;
                end
            end
            S2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S3;
                end
            end
            S3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S4;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            S4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state <= S1;
                    MATCH <= 1'b1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state <= S0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                next_state <= S0;
            end
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Implement a Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects a single-bit input IN. When the input is 10011, output MATCH is 1, and MATCH is 0 in other cases. Support for continuous input and loop detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to the FSM.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating a match condition based on the FSM state.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="S0">Initial state of the FSM.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S1">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S2">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S3">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S4">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S5">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S6">State of the FSM when the input is 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S7">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="S8">State of the FSM when the input is 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state">State register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="next_state">Next state register.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="MATCH_reg">MATCH register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always type="posedge" ports="CLK">
                <if_statement>
                    <if_condition>
                        <and_operator>
                            <constant>state == S0</constant>
                        </and_operator>
                    </if_condition>
                    <if_true>
                        <assignment>
                            <assignee>state</assignee>
                            <value>S0</value>
                        </assignment>
                    </if_true>
                    <if_false>
                        <assignment>
                            <assignee>state</assignee>
                            <value>next_state</value>
                        </assignment>
                    </if_false>
                </if_statement>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <always type="posedge" ports="RST">
                <if_statement>
                    <if_condition>
                        <and_operator>
                            <constant>state == S0</constant>
                        </and_operator>
                    </if_condition>
                    <if_true>
                        <assignment>
                            <assignee>MATCH_reg</assignee>
                            <value>0</value>
                        </assignment>
                    </if_true>
                </if_statement>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <always type="combinational">
                <if_statement>
                    <if_condition>
                        <and_operator>
                            <constant>state == S0</constant>
                        </and_operator>
                    </if_condition>
                    <if_true>
                        <assignment>
                            <assignee>MATCH_reg</assignee>
                            <value>0</value>
                        </assignment>
                    </if_true>
                    <if_false>
                        <if_statement>
                            <if_condition>
                                <and_operator>
                                    <constant>state == S1</constant>
                                    <constant>IN == 0</constant>
                                </and_operator>
                            </if_condition>
                            <if_true>
                                <assignment>
                                    <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                    <value>S2</value>
                                </assignment>
                            </if_true>
                            <if_false>
                                <if_statement>
                                    <if_condition>
                                        <and_operator>
                                            <constant>state == S2</constant>
                                            <constant>IN == 0</constant>
                                        </and_operator>
                                    </if_condition>
                                    <if_true>
                                        <assignment>
                                            <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                            <value>S3</value>
                                        </assignment>
                                    </if_true>
                                    <if_false>
                                        <if_statement>
                                            <if_condition>
                                                <and_operator>
                                                    <constant>state == S3</constant>
                                                    <constant>IN == 1</constant>
                                                </and_operator>
                                            </if_condition>
                                            <if_true>
                                                <assignment>
                                                    <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                                    <value>S4</value>
                                                </assignment>
                                            </if_true>
                                            <if_false>
                                                <if_statement>
                                                    <if_condition>
                                                        <and_operator>
                                                            <constant>state == S4</constant>
                                                            <constant>IN == 1</constant>
                                                        </and_operator>
                                                    </if_condition>
                                                    <if_true>
                                                        <assignment>
                                                            <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                                            <value>S1</value>
                                                        </assignment>
                                                    </if_true>
                                                    <if_false>
                                                        <if_statement>
                                                            <if_condition>
                                                                <and_operator>
                                                                    <constant>state == S1</constant>
                                                                    <constant>IN == 1</constant>
                                                                </and_operator>
                                                            </if_condition>
                                                            <if_true>
                                                                <assignment>
                                                                    <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                                                    <value>S0</value>
                                                                </assignment>
                                                            </if_true>
                                                            <if_false>
                                                                <if_statement>
                                                                    <if_condition>
                                                                        <and_operator>
                                                                            <constant>state == S0</constant>
                                                                            <constant>IN == 1</constant>
                                                                        </and_operator>
                                                                    </if_condition>
                                                                    <if_true>
                                                                        <assignment>
                                                                            <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                                                            <value>S1</value>
                                                                        </assignment>
                                                                    </if_true>
                                                                    <if_false>
                                                                        <assignment>
                                                                            <assignee>next_state</assignee>
                                                                            <value>S0</value>
                                                                        </assignment>
                                                                    </if_false>
                                                                </if_statement>
                                                            </if_false>
                                                        </if_statement>
                                                    </if_false>
                                                </if_statement>
                                            </if_false>
                                        </if_statement>
                                    </if_false>
                                </if_statement>
                            </if_false>
                        </if_statement>
                        <if_statement>
                            <if_condition>
                                <and_operator>
                                    <constant>state == S2</constant>
                                    <constant>IN == 0</constant>
                                </and_operator>
                            </if_condition>
                            <if_true>
                                <assignment>
                                    <assignee>MATCH_reg</assignee>
                                    <value>1</value>
                                </assignment>
                            </if_true>
                            <if_false>
                                <if_statement>
                                    <if_condition>
                                        <and_operator>
                                            <constant>state == S3</constant>
                                            <constant>IN == 0</constant>
                                        </and_operator>
                                    </if_condition>
                                    <if_true>
                                        <assignment>
                                            <assignee>MATCH_reg</assignee>
                                            <value>1</value>
                                        </assignment>
                                    </if_true>
                                    <if_false>
                                        <if_statement>
                                            <if_condition>
                                                <and_operator>
                                                    <constant>state == S4</constant>
                                                    <constant>IN == 0</constant>
                                                </and_operator>
                                            </if_condition>
                                            <if_true>
                                                <assignment>
                                                    <assignee>MATCH_reg</assignee>
                                                    <value>1</value>
                                                </assignment>
                                            </if_true>
                                            <if_false>
                                                <assignment>
                                                    <assignee>MATCH_reg</assignee>
                                                    <value>0</value>
                                                </assignment>
                                            </if_false>
                                        </if_statement>
                                    </if_false>
                                </if_statement>
                            </if_false>
                        </if_statement>
                    </if_false>
                </if_statement>
            </always>
        </combinational_logic>
        <assignment>
            <assignee>MATCH</assignee>
            <value>MATCH_reg</value>
        </assignment>
    </implementation>
</module>
